subcodes.title: Words to Will and Wendell Dodge, spoken on 1901-12-03
subcodes.first_line: It is stated in the New Testament that Jesus Christ was once drinking of the fruit of the vine and said he would drink no more except in the presence of the Father.
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @Christ; Christianity, @second birth, @Judas, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul
